summary: The user sought advice on caring for their basil plant struggling with too much sunlight and discussed the health of their snake plant. They also inquired about repotting their snake plant and dealing with pests on their fern, ultimately deciding to use neem oil for pest control and considering misting their fern for humidity.
facts: The user has a basil plant on their balcony that is struggling with too much direct sunlight. The user has a snake plant that they received from their sister last month and is currently thriving. The user has been using a general-purpose potting mix for their basil plant. The user has noticed tiny, moving pests on their fern and is concerned about their impact on the plant. The user plans to try neem oil to control the pests on their fern. The user is considering misting their fern more frequently to help prevent pests from returning.
